text:
Created attachment 229361
Update to 11.5.2

This version is a maintenance release and contains bug fixes only.

For details about the release, please see:

https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/11.5.2

or our news https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1152-maintenance-release-published <https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1152-maintenance-release-published>
